{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Redmoon Underlord
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Redmoon Underlord]] was sensed ahead of [[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
